title: cinder component manifest
description: Machine-readable index of every public component shipped by the cinder package. Agents fetch this file first to discover available components, then follow artifact subpath pointers.

$schema.description: Relative path to the JSON Schema that validates this file.

manifestVersion.description: Schema version sentinel. Always 1 for this format.

package.description: Package-level metadata describing the library and its conventions.

framework.description: The UI framework this package targets.

frameworkVersionRange.description: The peer-dependency range for the UI framework.

classPrefix.description: CSS class name prefix applied to all generated class names.

cssVarPrefix.description: Prefix for all CSS custom properties exposed by this package.

tokenNamespaces.description: Design-token namespaces this package defines CSS custom properties for.

stylesEntry.description: The import specifier consumers must import to load the global stylesheet.

schemaDialect.description: The JSON Schema dialect URI used by per-component schema files.

categories.description: Closed set of component categories. Keys are kebab-case category identifiers.

description.description: One-sentence description of what components in this category do.

statusLevels.description: Closed set of component maturity statuses. Keys are status identifiers; values are human-readable descriptions.

overlapFamilies.description: Named groupings of components that serve overlapping purposes. Use these to decide between similar components. Keys are family names; values are arrays of kebab-case component ids.

components.description: Ordered list of every public component. Stable components appear first, then experimental, each sub-group sorted alphabetically by id.

name.description: PascalCase component name for use in prose and documentation.

id.description: Kebab-case canonical identifier. Used in cross-references, artifact file names, and URL subpaths.

import.description: The import specifier consumers use to import this component. E.g. 'cinder/button' or 'cinder/experimental/json-viewer'.

exportName.description: The PascalCase named export that this component ships under.

category.description: Category identifier from the closed set defined in the 'categories' field.

status.description: Maturity status from the closed set defined in 'statusLevels'.

purpose.description: One-sentence description of what this component is for. 1–200 characters.

tags.description: Free-form classification tags for search and filtering.

useWhen.description: Guidance on when to reach for this component instead of a similar alternative.

avoidWhen.description: Guidance on when NOT to use this component and what to reach for instead.

items.description: One 'avoid when' entry: a reason plus an optional alternative component id.

reason.description: Why not to use this component in this situation.

alternative.description: Kebab-case id of the component to use instead.

related.description: Kebab-case ids of components that are frequently used alongside this one or serve related purposes.

hasConstraints.description: True when this component ships a constraints sidecar (cinder/{id}/constraints) encoding discriminated-union usage rules.

hasExamples.description: True when this component ships an examples sidecar (cinder/{id}/examples) with canonical code samples.

artifacts.description: Subpath import specifiers for the machine-readable artifacts this component ships.

schema.description: Import specifier for the JSON Schema describing this component's props.

variables.description: Import specifier for the CSS custom property definitions for this component.

examples.description: Import specifier for the examples sidecar. Present only when hasExamples is true.

constraints.description: Import specifier for the constraints sidecar. Present only when hasConstraints is true.

a11y.description: Accessibility metadata, present only when @a11yPattern / @keyboardShortcut / @a11yNote tags were authored.

pattern.description: WAI-ARIA pattern name this component implements.

keys.description: Key or chord, e.g. 'Enter / Space' or 'Shift + Tab'.
